sections.title: 一、基金基础信息
sections.data_sql: SELECT c_fd_code, c_short_name, c_full_name, c_estabdate, c_class1_name, c_class2_name, c_class3_name, c_manager_name, c_custodian_name, c_company_name, c_invest_scope, c_purchase_status, c_redeem_status, c_mgmt_fee_rate FROM tb_fd_basic_info WHERE c_fd_code = '{fund_code}'

sections.title: 二、净值表现
sections.data_sql: SELECT c_trade_date, c_nav, c_nav_acc, c_nav_adj, c_ret_1d, c_ret_1w, c_ret_1m, c_ret_3m, c_ret_6m, c_ret_1y, c_ret_ytd, c_ret_ann FROM tb_fd_nav_daily WHERE c_fd_code = '{fund_code}' ORDER BY c_trade_date DESC LIMIT 30

sections.title: 三、持仓结构
sections.data_sql: SELECT c_report_date, c_fund_nav_total, c_stk_total_mv, c_stk_total_ratio, c_bd_total_mv, c_bd_total_ratio, c_cash_total_mv, c_cash_total_ratio FROM tb_fd_asset_allocation WHERE c_fd_code = '{fund_code}' ORDER BY c_report_date DESC LIMIT 4
